Scientific Research Projects (BAP)

Okan Homepage

Research

Research and Projects Development Directorate

Scientific Research Projects (BAP)

MENU

BAP (Scientific Research Projects) is an application developed to support scientific research in higher education institutions. All academic staff of our university can apply to the BAP Commission and receive resources for their scientific research.

Project applications are made to the BAP Commission via ARPROGED.

BAP Application Calendar (BAP applications are received within the date range specified below)

What do we recommend about Scientific Research Projects?

BAP is the best option especially for those who are preparing a pr

oject proposal for the first time and for those who want to do preliminary work before TUBITAK Project Application. In addition, considering the evaluation criteria while preparing your project proposal can increase the likelihood of the project being accepted.

* You can contact infoarproged@okan.edu.tr for BAP Upper Limit information.

Budget Utilization in BAP Support

For the budget utilization of the projects whose BAP application process is finalized positively, we will work together with the Financial Affairs Coordinatorship. The executor of the project that wins the budget must create a purchase request for the purchase and submit it to the Financial Affairs Coordinator's Office with the following documents;

“Budget and Justification” filled in during the project application

Proforma Invoice

After the relevant request is created, the relevant purchases will be made by Financial Affairs and the project coordinator will be informed.

After the relevant request is created, the relevant purchases will be made by Financial Affairs and the project coordinator will be informed.

** In cases where a Proforma Invoice cannot be provided, the Financial Affairs Coordinator's Office should be contacted.
